description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit featuring three spacious, rectangular shelves supported by a black metal frame. The shelves themselves appear to be made of wood with a slightly weathered finish, giving the piece a rustic yet modern look. The frame is constructed with cross-bracing on the sides for added stability and visual interest, and the corners are reinforced with metal brackets. The open design allows for easy access from all sides, making it suitable for storing or displaying a variety of items. The overall construction suggests durability and the ability to hold heavy objects, making it ideal for use in garages, workshops, or urban loft spaces. There are no doors, drawers, or visible handles, emphasizing its open, utilitarian function.
description: A sturdy, industrial-style shelving unit with three wooden shelves and a black metal frame featuring cross-bracing. Its open design and reinforced corners make it ideal for heavy-duty storage or display in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the shelves and the cross-bracing on the frame.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all three shelves and the open, accessible design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the cross-bracing and shelf depth seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view, similar to the front, showing the open shelving and frame structure.
